summary: Software engineer with 4 years of experience building web applications and internal tools using TypeScript, React, and Node.js.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built customer-facing dashboards in React and TypeScript used by 12 internal teams.
Designed REST APIs in Node.js backed by PostgreSQL, reducing report generation time by 30%.
Collaborated with product and design on feature delivery in two-week agile sprints.
Wrote unit and integration tests with Jest, improving release confidence for the team.

experience.title: Junior Developer
bullets: Maintained legacy JavaScript modules and migrated components to React.
Fixed production bugs and participated in on-call rotation for critical services.

projects.name: Open Budget Tracker
bullets: Implemented expense categorization and CSV export with Next.js and SQLite.
